questionHtml:
What is the IUPAC name of this molecule?

A.  1,1,2,4-tetramethylpent-1-ene

B.  2,4,5-trimethylhex-4-ene

C.  2,4,5,5-tetramethylpent-4-ene

D.  2,3,5-trimethylhex-2-ene

meta.title: What is the IUPAC name of this molecule? A. 1,1,2,4-tetramethylpent-1-ene B. 2,4,5-trimethylhex-4-ene C. 2,4,5,5-tetramethylpent-4-ene D. 2,3,5-trimethylhex-2-ene
